name: the-art-of-intelligence
description: A simple AI learning roadmap and lesson website.

scripts.check: npm run check:scripts && npm run audit:lessons
scripts.check:scripts: node --check lesson-data.js && node --check site-template.js && node --check lessons/generative-modelling/generative-modelling-data.js && node --check lessons/generative-modelling/generative-modelling-index.js && node --check lessons/generative-modelling/generative-modelling-topic.js && node --check lessons/mathematical-foundations/mathematical-foundations-data.js && node --check lessons/mathematical-foundations/mathematical-foundations-topic.js && node --check scripts/audit-lessons.mjs && node --check scripts/apply-site-templates.mjs && node --check scripts/create-lesson.mjs && node --check scripts/list-lessons.mjs && node --check scripts/serve.mjs
